summary: Removed the repository's GitHub pull request template. The deleted file only contained a one-line reminder to read CONTRIBUTING.md before submitting a PR, so this was a repository workflow/documentation cleanup rather than a decompilation or source-code change.

key_files.notes: Removed the single-line PR template text: 'Before submitting a pull request, please read our contributing guidelines.'

what_changed: Removed the automatic PR description prompt that linked contributors to ./CONTRIBUTING.md.
No game source, headers, build scripts, symbols, or matching-related files were changed.
smart_moves: Kept the cleanup minimal and isolated to the GitHub metadata file.
Removed a thin wrapper document rather than changing the contributing guidelines themselves.
decomp_lessons: This PR contains no direct decompilation, matching, struct, header, or symbol-naming lessons.
For future PR archaeology, classify this as repository process metadata rather than evidence for code or matching conventions.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review bodies were present in the provided PR context.
follow_up_queries: Check whether CONTRIBUTING.md remains linked from another discoverable location for new contributors.
Do not use this PR as evidence for decompilation naming or matching practices.
